name: openclaw-research-agents
description: Governed, local-first research, dataset, and release-packaging system for OpenClaw Research Agents

scripts.phase14:demo: node scripts/run-research-task.js --task "Summarize the sample input documents" --type summarize --input workspace/research-input/sample/ --output workspace/research-output/ --provider mock --confirm
scripts.phase20:verify: node scripts/verify-node-runtime.js && bash scripts/verify-phase20-policy.sh && node --test tests/core/phase20-dataset-validator.test.js tests/core/phase20-dataset-deduper.test.js tests/core/phase20-provenance-tracker.test.js tests/core/phase20-dataset-scorer.test.js tests/core/phase20-license-review.test.js tests/core/phase20-dataset-output-manager.test.js tests/integration/phase20-dataset-commercialization.test.js tests/integration/phase20-dataset-offer-gating.test.js tests/security/phase20-policy-gate.test.js
scripts.monetization:verify: node scripts/verify-node-runtime.js && bash scripts/verify-monetization-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase20-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase21-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase22-policy.sh && node --test tests/core/phase19-offer-schema.test.js tests/core/phase19-offer-builder.test.js tests/core/phase19-deliverable-packager.test.js tests/core/phase19-submission-pack-generator.test.js tests/core/phase19-release-approval-manager.test.js tests/core/phase21-publisher-adapter-registry.test.js tests/core/phase21-monetization-runtime.test.js tests/core/phase22-submission-evidence-schema.test.js tests/core/phase22-submission-evidence-manager.test.js tests/integration/phase19-mission-offer-export.test.js tests/integration/phase19-dataset-offer-export.test.js tests/integration/phase20-dataset-offer-gating.test.js tests/integration/phase21-adapter-approval-export.test.js tests/integration/phase22-post-export-evidence.test.js tests/security/phase19-monetization-policy-gate.test.js tests/security/phase20-policy-gate.test.js tests/security/phase21-policy-gate.test.js tests/security/phase22-policy-gate.test.js
scripts.phase19:verify: node scripts/verify-node-runtime.js && bash scripts/verify-phase19-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-monetization-policy.sh && node --test tests/core/phase19-offer-schema.test.js tests/core/phase19-offer-builder.test.js tests/core/phase19-deliverable-packager.test.js tests/core/phase19-submission-pack-generator.test.js tests/core/phase19-release-approval-manager.test.js tests/core/phase19-schema-engine.test.js tests/core/phase19-dataset-builder.test.js tests/core/phase19-dataset-output-manager.test.js tests/integration/phase19-research-to-dataset.test.js tests/integration/phase19-mission-offer-export.test.js tests/integration/phase19-dataset-offer-export.test.js tests/security/phase19-monetization-policy-gate.test.js tests/security/phase19-policy-gate.test.js
scripts.phase2:gates: node scripts/verify-node-runtime.js && bash scripts/cleanroom-purge-validate.sh && bash scripts/verify-secrets.sh && bash scripts/verify-no-lifecycle-hooks.sh && bash scripts/verify-npm-cache-checksum.sh && node scripts/validate-runtime-policy.js && bash scripts/verify-tool-registry-checksum.sh && bash scripts/verify-container-digest.sh && bash scripts/lint-restricted-globals.sh && bash scripts/verify-mcp-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-mutation-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase5-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase6-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase7-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-cline-supervisor-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase8-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase9-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase10-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase11-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase12-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase13-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase14-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase15-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase16-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase17-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase18-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-monetization-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase19-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase20-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase21-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase22-policy.sh && bash scripts/verify-phase26-policy.sh && node --test tests/**/*.test.js
